news.headline: Genmab A/S' Annual General Meeting concludes; key decisions made, including approval of financial reports and election of board members.
Research indicates high government debt may fuel inflation, imposing cost pressure on Americans with higher mortgage rates.
news.summary: Economic experts express concern that implementing deficit finance policies could lead to increased financial burdens for American households, potentially causing higher mortgage rates.

news.headline: Cruisebound reveals insights into cruise passenger demographics and booking trends in 2025 amid economic uncertainty.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Cruisebound, a rapidly expanding online cruise agency in the United States, shared data on the changing demographics and booking trends of cruise passengers. As economic instability continues, cruises emerge as a desirable travel option for many. This information sheds light on the shifting preferences and behaviors of travelers, showcasing the significance of this industry in accommodating varying consumer needs.

news.headline: YMCA USA's CEO Suzanne McCormick testifying on combating senior loneliness at Senate Committee on Aging. #SocialConnectedness
news.summary: Suzanne McCormick, the President and CEO of YMCA of the USA, emphasized the significance of social connectedness at a hearing titled "Breaking the Cycle of Senior Loneliness: Strengthening Families and Community Support" in Chicago on March 12, 2025. The hearing aims to address issues related to senior loneliness and advocate for stronger family and community support systems. McCormick's testimony highlights the importance of combating social isolation among seniors, with a focus on enhancing connections within families and communities.

news.headline: Luxury senior living community Inspīr Embassy Row in Washington D.C. launches monthly speaker series "The Exchange" featuring thought leaders.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, an ultra-luxury senior living community called Inspīr Embassy Row situated in the prestigious Embassy Row neighborhood of Washington D.C., introduced a new monthly speaker series titled "The Exchange: Expert Views, Timely Topics." This initiative aims to bring valuable insights and discussions to the residents and guests.

news.headline: NASA's SpaceX Crew-10 astronauts will conduct biomedical, physical science research on the ISS. Four crew members involved.
news.summary: Four crew members are set to participate in a cutting-edge scientific mission at the International Space Station (ISS) beginning on March 12, 2025. During this expedition, the astronauts will support a variety of groundbreaking biomedical investigations and physical science projects funded by the National Science Foundation (NSF). The research conducted as part of this mission is expected to advance scientific knowledge in various fields.

news.headline: Karolinska Development's PharmNovo gets FDA nod for Phase 2a trial of PN6047, targeting peripheral neuropathy & allodynia.
news.summary: In Stockholm today, on March 12, 2025, Karolinska Development AB shared news that portfolio company PharmNovo has received promising feedback for its leading drug candidate, PN6047. The feedback came during a pre-IND discussion with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) concerning the design of their upcoming Phase 2a clinical trial intended for treating peripheral neuropathy and allodynia. PharmNovo, a company under Karolinska Development AB listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under KDEV, is optimistic about the development of PN6047 following this positive interaction with the FDA.

news.headline: US Trade Rep: EU has rejected US efforts to deal with global excess steel and aluminum capacity-statement.
Canada Finance Minister: An early review of USMCA trade pact is not on Canada's agenda for meetings in Washington this week.
CBD market to hit $291.39B by 2032, growing at 30.6% CAGR from 2025 - Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: The market for CBD-infused products is projected to have a remarkable growth rate, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 30.6% anticipated from 2025 to 2032. This data comes from a recent market research report that focuses on the size, share, forecasts, and trends within the CBD-infused products sector. The report delves into various aspects including the sources of CBD, predominantly from hemp, and the types of products available such as edibles. The analysis highlights the increasing popularity and demand for CBD-infused goods in the market. The report was released on March 12, 2025, in Redding, California.

news.headline: Energy sector shifting to clean sources with increasing investment in renewables despite ongoing support for fossil fuels.
Sezzle revamps shopping experience with new features for smarter spending, focusing on flexibility, transparency, and savings.
news.summary: Sezzle has recently unveiled new updates aimed at improving flexibility, transparency, and savings during the checkout process. These changes are designed to provide users with a more seamless experience when making purchases online. The updates include features that offer greater control and visibility, as well as opportunities for cost savings. With these enhancements, Sezzle users can benefit from a more streamlined and efficient checkout process, leading to an improved overall shopping experience.

news.headline: Trump plans to nominate Michelle Bowman as Fed's vice chair for supervision, replacing Michael Barr. Source: Bloomberg.
news.summary: Donald Trump is expected to nominate Michelle Bowman, a Federal Reserve Governor, as the central bank's vice chair for supervision, as per Bloomberg. This decision, revealed by a reliable source, may be disclosed today, signaling a notable change in the Fed's regulatory oversight. The move follows Michael Barr's resignation from the position earlier this year due to worries about a clash with Trump. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Canada Finance Minister: Canada Ministers to visit Washington this week to speak with Trump administration, aiming to get relief from US tariffs.
US Trade Rep: EU's trade policies are out of step with reality.

XRP price rises by 6% to $2.24 after market crash. Franklin Templeton files XRP ETF, boosting odds of US approval to 76%. Onchain data suggests price bottomed, eyes V-shaped recovery to $2.64, indicating 20% gain potential. Remember, always do your own research before investing.
news.summary: XRP saw a 6% daily gain to $2.24 following a market crash, trading 18% above the daily low of $1.89. Franklin Templeton filed for an XRP ETF, boosting XRP's potential as an investment. The filing influenced speculation of significant capital inflows into XRP, potentially pushing its price into double digits. The odds of a US spot XRP ETF approval in 2025 are at 76%. XRP's onchain data, like the MVRV ratio, suggests a price bottom. XRP aims for a V-shaped recovery, eyeing a 20% gain to $2.64. Bullish momentum is strengthening with the RSI rising from 27 to 44. This news does not offer investment advice.

news.headline: Canada's gift card market to grow by 7.5% annually, reaching US$8.43 billion in 2025 with 8.0% CAGR in 2020-2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Canada Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q1 2025 Update" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The gift card market in Canada is projected to experience a 7.5% annual growth rate, reaching an estimated value of US$8.43 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, the gift card market in Canada showed strong expansion, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.0%. This positive trend is anticipated to persist, indicating continued growth in the market.

news.headline: Mortgage rates reach lowest point since October with applications rising 11.2% last week. 30-year loan average: 6.67%.
news.summary: Mortgage rates have reached their lowest point since October of last year, with the average rate on a 30-year loan dropping to 6.67%. This significant decrease in rates led to an 11.2% increase in mortgage loan applications last week, as reported by the Mortgage Bankers Association. This marks the sixth consecutive week of declining rates, with application volume up by 31% compared to the previous year. These developments have generated much interest within the housing market.

news.headline: Highline receives CPF BOOT grant to expand fiber broadband in Liberty County, Texas, boosting high-speed access.
news.summary: In Liberty County, Texas, on March 12, 2025, it was reported that Highline secured a CPF BOOT grant to enhance high-speed fiber broadband accessibility in the region. This initiative aims to extend the reach of broadband services and reinforce Highline's presence in Liberty County.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: BRK/B - Sell - undisclosed - $15,001 - $50,000 -  - Eleanor Holmes 
 transaction date: 2025-03-05 
 filed at date: 2025-03-11
Tesla stock rises despite 2 price-target cuts as analysts reduce delivery and earnings estimates, set to bounce.
news.summary: Despite two more price-target decreases, Tesla stock is expected to continue its upward trend. Analysts have reduced delivery and earnings estimates, reflecting a challenging outlook for the company. The stock's resilience comes despite the cuts, showcasing investor confidence. Tesla's stock rise indicates positive sentiment.

news.headline: Bitcoin may drop further, targeted at $73,000. Analysts predict bearish trend with Short BTC ETFs spike amid stalled momentum.
news.summary: A recent report indicates a slowdown in cryptocurrency momentum, particularly in bitcoin, which is predicted to decrease further. Analysts suggest the price may drop to $73,000, citing a crucial moving average as a key factor. Additionally, the surge in Short BTC ETFs reflects a growing interest in betting against bitcoin in the market.

news.headline: Vesco Clean Energy LLC specializes in battery management & EV charging stations; New facility opened in Grand Rapids.
news.summary: A recently established company, Vesco Clean Energy LLC, has been launched to address the changing energy requirements of customers. To support this initiative, a new battery management facility has been established in Grand Rapids. The company is based in Southfield, Michigan, and the launch took place on March 12, 2025. Vesco Clean Energy LLC focuses on providing specialized battery management services to meet the evolving energy needs of customers.

news.headline: Orban makes gains in poll against Magyar; lead tightens.
Clayman Thyroid Center to launch Hashimoto's Disease Awareness Day on March 12, aiming to educate millions affected.
news.summary: A recently unveiled campaign led by the Clayman Thyroid Center is dedicated to informing, supporting, and empowering the large number of individuals grappling with Hashimoto's disease. This initiative includes the establishment of Hashimoto's Disease Awareness Day, slated to take place each year on the second Wednesday of March. The event will strive to reach millions impacted by the condition in need of education and advocacy. This effort is set to commence in 2025 and will be headquartered in TAMPA, Florida.

news.headline: Covet.Life promotes managing estate assets to cherish personal valuables, preventing them from being lost.
news.summary: In Irvine, California on March 12, 2025, Covet.Life, a platform for actively managing estate assets, promotes valuing personal assets and belongings. It emphasizes the importance of safeguarding these possessions to prevent any loss or oversight.

news.headline: Limestone Networks partners with Inertia Labs to aid businesses in transitioning to dedicated server solutions.
news.summary: Limestone Networks, a leading provider of global bare metal and cloud hosting solutions, has recently collaborated with Inertia Labs, a cloud modernization and infrastructure specialist. This partnership aims to assist businesses in migrating to high-performance, cost-efficient dedicated server solutions. The initiative comes as a response to the increasing demand for reliable hosting services. The announcement was made in Dallas on March 12, 2025, highlighting the importance of this strategic collaboration.Overall, businesses seeking to optimize their operations and enhance their online presence can benefit from this collaboration. The partnership brings together Limestone Networks' expertise in global hosting solutions and Inertia Labs' proficiency in cloud modernization, creating a comprehensive approach for companies looking to transition to dedicated server solutions. This venture is expected to provide businesses with tailored and reliable services to meet their specific needs in today's competitive digital landscape.

news.headline: Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council & Premise Health open Carpenters Wellness Center in Kansas City.
news.summary: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on March 12, 2025, the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council (MACRC) and Premise Health, a top direct health care provider for employers and unions, marked the grand opening of the Carpenters Wellness Center in Kansas City. The center...

news.headline: Inventors from Monroe, Ga., created READY MADE BED SHEETS to keep fitted sheets tight. New innovation to improve sleeping experience.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2025, two inventors from Monroe, Georgia expressed their motivation to develop a solution for maintaining tight and well-aligned fitted bed sheets. The result of their innovation is the READY MADE BED SHEETS, a product designed to prevent fitted sheets from loosening or slipping. This invention marks a significant advancement in the bedding industry, addressing the common issue of sheets becoming untucked during use. This new approach aims to streamline the bed-making process and enhance the overall appearance of the bed. The inventors highlighted the success of their creation in achieving clean lines and a neat aesthetic for the bed.

Fear and Greed Index: 18/100 = Extreme Fear
Kojamo plc has successfully issued a green bond worth EUR 500 million under its EMTN programme.
Europe and Canada retaliate against Trump tariffs with billions in levies as trade war raises fears of higher consumer prices.
news.summary: Following the implementation of President Trump's worldwide tariffs on metals, the European Union and Canada have retaliated by imposing billions of dollars in levies on American products. Economists are concerned that this trade conflict could eventually lead to an increase in U.S. consumer prices. In February, consumer prices rose slightly less than anticipated.

news.headline: MAX Surgical Specialty Management appoints Dr. Margo J. Freedberg as Medical Director and Dr. Sung Hee Cho as Chief Medical Officer.
news.summary: Hackensack, New Jersey - On March 12, 2025, MAX Surgical Specialty Management (MAX), a surgeon-led support platform catering to oral and maxillofacial surgery (OMS) practices, announced the appointment of Dr. Margo J. Freedberg as Medical Director and Dr. Sung Hee Cho as Chief Medical Officer. This strategic move comes in response to the growing demand for specialized OMS services.

news.headline: ShipMonk expands with 2 new fulfillment centers in Las Vegas, NV, and Pittston, PA, solidifying its position in the arena.
news.summary: ShipMonk, a tech-enabled 3PL provider, has officially launched two new fulfillment centers in Las Vegas, NV, and Pittston, PA. This move strengthens its position in the fulfillment sector. The activation of these state-of-the-art facilities signifies a significant commitment to empowering merchants from the get-go. ShipMonk's dedication to supporting merchant growth is evident through this strategic expansion.

news.headline: Hungary's Election: Orban closes gap on Magyar in latest polls, numbers show.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the number of COVID-19 cases has surpassed 5 million worldwide, with over 300,000 deaths reported. The United States remains the most affected country, with over 1.5 million cases and 90,000 deaths. Spain, Italy, and the United Kingdom are also among the countries with a high number of cases. The global economy has taken a significant hit, with predictions of a 3% contraction in GDP this year. Governments around the world continue to implement measures to slow the spread of the virus and provide support to their citizens during these challenging times.

news.headline: PranaX Corporation appoints Phillip Maderia as CEO, a biopharmaceutical veteran with 30+ years of experience.
news.summary: Houston-based PranaX Corporation, a leading company in exosome-based regenerative wellness, has recently appointed Phillip Maderia as its new Chief Executive Officer. Maderia brings more than 30 years of experience in biopharmaceutical manufacturing to the role. This appointment highlights PranaX's commitment to leadership and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Foundation testifies before Senate, unveils 2025-2027 roadmap to address social isolation & build communities. Agenda calls for reforms in health, education, employment, and community infrastructure.
news.summary: Today in Washington, a comprehensive agenda was unveiled focusing on systemic reforms in health, education, employment, and community infrastructure. This initiative comes ahead of the United States Senate Special Committee on Aging hearing scheduled for today. The Foundation for Social Connection Action presented this ambitious plan, emphasizing the need for substantial changes in various sectors. The agenda aims to address critical issues and significant challenges faced by citizens across the country.

news.headline: Couche-Tard wins 2025 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award for 4th time in a row, showcasing outstanding workplace culture.
news.summary: In Laval, Quebec on March 12, 2025, Alimentation Couche-Tard, a prominent player in convenience and mobility services, has been honored with the 2025 Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award (GEWA). This prestigious accolade acknowledges the company for maintaining one of the most engaged workplace cultures globally. Remarkably, this marks the fourth consecutive year that Alimentation Couche-Tard has received this esteemed award.

news.headline: Big Whiskey's expands into Texas with a three-location deal, marking its first venture into the state.
news.summary: A restaurant chain originating from Missouri has recently signed a significant deal to open three new locations, marking its initial foray into the state of Texas. Big Whiskey's American Restaurant & Bar, which is based in Missouri, announced plans on March 12, 2025, to expand its operations into Texas. The multi-location agreement reflects the company's strategic move to broaden its presence in the Southern region. This expansion signifies a notable milestone for the restaurant chain as it diversifies its market reach, with the inclusion of three new establishments in Texas.

news.headline: Canada's Foreign Minister Joly: Canada to work with Europe to put pressure on Trump administration.
Blood test measuring PD-L1, conducted by researchers from Creatv Bio, Mayo Clinic, and BriaCell Therapeutics, reveals crucial clinical data.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by researchers from Creatv Bio, a division of Creatv MicroTech, Inc. in Monmouth Junction, New Jersey, and The Mayo Clinic in Jacksonville, Florida, in partnership with BriaCell Therapeutics Corporation in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, has revealed promising results. The study, conducted in March 2025, highlights significant findings in the collaboration between these institutions. This research collaboration is paving the way for revolutionary advancements in the field of medicine.

news.headline: Hinterland Insurance appoints Mohmoud Bondugjie as AVP of General Commercial amid restructuring efforts for stronger underwriting divisions.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Hinterland Insurance (Hinterland) appointed Mohmoud Bondugjie as the new Assistant Vice President of General Commercial. This move is part of the company's restructuring efforts to enhance its underwriting divisions. Bondugjie's new role signals a strategic development aimed at bolstering Hinterland's operations in the general commercial sector.

news.headline: xTool unveils Apparel Printer, surpasses $1M on Kickstarter in 1.5 hrs. Expansion successful.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on March 12, 2025, xTool, a prominent DIY laser engraving company, revealed its growth through the Apparel Printer on Kickstarter. The campaign achieved its funding target in just 1.5 hours, ultimately exceeding $1 million. As of now, the xTool's Apparel Printer has collected a total amount exceeding the initial goals.

news.headline: Emergency call made by veterinarian from fellow employee inside the building in Minneapolis.
news.summary: A veterinarian in Minneapolis received an urgent call from a colleague on March 12, 2025. The distressed call came from an employee who was at home with their dog, reminiscent of a scene from a horror movie. The exact details of the situation were not disclosed, but it sparked an emergency response from the veterinarian. The incident highlights the unexpectedly dire situations that can arise even when one is in the comfort of their own home.

news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. introduces new quantum protocol based on continuous control modulation for dephasing noise mitigation.
news.summary: A technology service provider based in Shenzhen, China, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO), recently introduced a new protocol related to dephasing noise spectral, utilizing continuous control modulation with a focus on two-qubit systems. The protocol aims to effectively address issues related to noise interference. This announcement was made on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Carpool Logistics receives $12M in Series A funding from Wavecrest and CarMax to expand vehicle shipping platform.
news.summary: Carpool Logistics, a top vehicle logistics platform, recently disclosed its securing of $12 million in Series A growth capital. This new funding is anticipated to expedite technology advancements, enhance operational scalability, and reinforce relationships with customers. This capital injection signifies a significant milestone for the company and is poised to drive further expansion and innovation.

news.headline: AB „Vilkyškių pieninė“ acquired claim rights from AB „Šiaulių bankas“ secured by UAB “Marijampolės pieno konservai” and UAB “Lukšių pieninė”. Amount undisclosed.
news.summary: AB “Vilkyškių pieninė”, a part of VILVI Group, has finalized a claim right assignment deal with AB “Šiaulių bankas” on 24th February 2025. The agreement involves the transfer of outstanding obligations from UAB “Marijampolės pieno konservai” and UAB “Lukšių pieninė” to the bank. These obligations are backed by the assets of the said companies and additional guarantees. The acquisition of these claim rights was made utilizing AB Vilkyškių pieninė’s resources, although the specific transaction amount remains confidential due to the terms of the agreement.

news.headline: Navigator Gas corrects the record date for a $0.05 per share cash dividend, now payable on April 3, 2025 to shareholders as of March 24, 2025.
news.summary: Navigator Holdings Ltd. announced a correction to its press release regarding a cash dividend of $0.05 per share for the quarter ending December 31, 2024. The dividend will be paid on April 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 24, 2025, instead of March 23, 2025, as previously stated. Navigator Gas is a leading global operator of liquefied gas carriers, specializing in petrochemical gases, LPG, and ammonia transportation. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US inflation rate decreases, providing slight relief amidst upcoming tariffs. #economy #tariffs
